actionUnits.condition: Prepare door logic: call room3.SetLaser() once so laser1 becomes true (MonoBehaviour component id 829909757, script guid 1b862119da8709d4e9055a3c441a7bb4). Satisfy open condition: call room3.SetLaser() a second consecutive time to set laser2 true (component id 829909757). In Update(), with laser1 && laser2 && !doorOpen, expect doorAnim.Play("DoorOpen", 0, 0.0f) on Animator id 1865011923 and winton.Play() on AudioSource id 829909759; doorOpen flips to true.

Room 3 Animator doorAnim (fileID 1865011923) and AudioSource winton (fileID 829909759) are wired via scene config. This should not open the door yet. Activate second laser via room3.SetLaser() on Room 3 (id 829909757). With laser1 && laser2 && !doorOpen, Update() should set doorOpen=true, play Animator "DoorOpen" on 1865011923 and AudioSource.Play() on 829909759.
Negative path: simulate reconnection to a Receiver by deactivating one laser. Call room3.DesactivateLaser() (id 829909757). Door remains open because script does not close it once opened.
